Title: PostgreSQL Like a Pro: Build mission-critical apps at any scale with Azure HorizonDB
Description:
Dingding Liu shares a sneak peek at Azure HorizonDB, the newest PostgreSQL managed service from Microsoft thats built for extreme scale and performance.

See how HorizonDB decouples compute and storage, delivers sub millisecond multi zone commits, and powers AI native workloads with built in vector indexing and SQL based AI functions.

0:00 Introduction 0:31 Microsoft’s investment in PostgreSQL 0:47 What is Azure HorizonDB 1:19 Demo: Adding a new HorizonDB cluster in VS Code 1:50 Integration with Microsoft Foundry 2:05 Query conversion 2:59 Performance at scale 4:44 Extending to scaling out replica over shared storage 5:33 Wrap Up

CTA Links: 📺 Watch the series: https://www.aka.ms/PostgreLikeAPro 💻 Check out Azure HorizonDB: https://aka.ms/AzureHorizonDB
Author: Microsoft Developer
